title: The "oral-gut axis" transmission of microorganisms in colorectal cancer: Insights fromperspective.
snippet: Colorectal cancer (CRC) is linked to gut microecological imbalances, and increasing evidence suggests that oral-gut microecosystem aberrant interactions also significantly contribute to CRC pathogenesis. The emerging "oral-gut axis" offers novel perspectives into the cross-organ microbial regulation. Notably, the oral bacteriumexhibits spatiotemporal specif...
